test.name: 007_01_01 Create A Temporal Representation Of An Entity

kw.name: Create Temporal Entity
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Create Or Update Temporal Representation Of Entity Selecting Content Type
Load Json From File
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: Update Value To Json
kw.doc: Update value to JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:9090/ngsi-ld/v1/temporal/entities/ path_url=/ngsi-ld/v1/temporal/entities/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/ld+json', 'Content-Length': '646'} body=b'{"id": "urn:ngsi-ld:Vehicle:1903210338118568", "type": "Vehicle", "speed": [{"type": "Property", "value": 120, "observedAt": "2020-09-01T12:03:00Z"}, {"type": "Property", "value": 80, "observedAt": "2020-09-01T12:05:00Z"}], "fuelLevel": [{"type": "Property", "value": 67, "observedAt": "2020-09-01T12:03:00Z"}, {"type": "Property", "value": 53, "observedAt": "2020-09-01T13:05:00Z"}, {"type": "Property", "value": 40, "observedAt": "2020-09-01T14:07:00Z", "datasetId": "urn:ngsi-ld:Vehicle:12345-fuel"}], "@context": ["https://forge.etsi.org/rep/cim/ngsi-ld-test-suite/-/raw/develop/resources/jsonld-contexts/ngsi-ld-test-suite-compound.jsonld"]}'

POST Response : url=http://localhost:9090/ngsi-ld/v1/temporal/entities/ status=201, reason=Created headers={'Location': '/ngsi-ld/v1/temporal/entities/urn:ngsi-ld:Vehicle:1903210338118568', 'content-length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Output
kw.msg: Create Or Update Temporal Representation Of Entity Selecting Content Type
kw.arg: Create Or Update Temporal Representation Of Entity Selecting Content Type
kw.doc: *Request and response are output to terminal and file (in JSON).* :param response: response to a request :param description: explains what request is being made :param console: If false, the JSON is not written to terminal. Default is true.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: HTTP status code comparison failed with (expected, actual) ->
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.

kw.name: Load Json From File
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: Update Value To Json
kw.doc: Update value to JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:9090/ngsi-ld/v1/temporal/entities/urn:ngsi-ld:Vehicle:1903210338118568 path_url=/ngsi-ld/v1/temporal/entities/urn:ngsi-ld:Vehicle:1903210338118568 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Link': '<https://forge.etsi.org/rep/cim/ngsi-ld-test-suite/-/raw/develop/resources/jsonld-contexts/ngsi-ld-test-suite-compound.jsonld>; rel="http://www.w3.org/ns/json-ld#context"; type="application/ld+json"'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Output
kw.doc: *Request and response are output to terminal and file (in JSON).* :param response: response to a request :param description: explains what request is being made :param console: If false, the JSON is not written to terminal. Default is true.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Load Json From File
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: Update Value To Json
kw.doc: Update value to JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Compare Dictionaries Ignoring Keys
kw.doc: Function exposed as a keyword to compare two dictionaries :param expected: expected dictionary :param actual: actual dictionary :param exclude_regex_paths: list of regex paths of keys to be ignored :param ignore_core_context_version: whether any core context version is allowed in the results :param group_by: a key to group the results, useful for lists of results

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.
Check that one can create a temporal representation of an entity

kw.name: DELETE
kw.msg: DELETE Response : url=http://localhost:9090/ngsi-ld/v1/temporal/entities/urn:ngsi-ld:Vehicle:1903210338118568 status=204, reason=No Content headers={} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request.

kw.name: Output
kw.doc: *Request and response are output to terminal and file (in JSON).* :param response: response to a request :param description: explains what request is being made :param console: If false, the JSON is not written to terminal. Default is true.

test.name: 007_02_01 Create A Temporal Entity With An Invalid Json

kw.name: Create Temporal Entity From File
Create Temporal Representation Of Entity Selecting Content Type
Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Output
kw.msg: Create Temporal Representation Of Entity Selecting Content Type
kw.arg: Create Temporal Representation Of Entity Selecting Content Type
kw.doc: *Request and response are output to terminal and file (in JSON).* :param response: response to a request :param description: explains what request is being made :param console: If false, the JSON is not written to terminal. Default is true.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: HTTP status code comparison failed with (expected, actual) ->
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Check Response Body Containing ProblemDetails Element Containing Type Element set to
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Check Response Body Containing ProblemDetails Element Containing Title Element
Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Check that one cannot create a temporal entity with an empty/invalid json/id

kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Compare Dictionaries Ignoring Keys
kw.doc: Function exposed as a keyword to compare two dictionaries :param expected: expected dictionary :param actual: actual dictionary :param exclude_regex_paths: list of regex paths of keys to be ignored :param ignore_core_context_version: whether any core context version is allowed in the results :param group_by: a key to group the results, useful for lists of results

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.
